Election.title: BV2223 — STAR vs strategy — 5-1-0 min-max, real moderate: STAR keeps the CW, IRV doesn't
Election.description: rb-j's 5-1-0 challenge, but the moderate Beth has a real first-choice base (25 vs poles 40/35). Same min-max ballots; two races on the same preferences. STAR: the pooled '1's lift Beth into the runoff and she wins (the Condorcet winner). IRV: Beth still has the fewest firsts and is eliminated. So 5-1-0 STAR is IRV-LIKE, not IRV-identical — the '1's carry real weight.

races.title: RCV-IRV — the same preferences as ranks
